name: FeatureCardTwentySeven
description: Interactive flip cards with 3D rotation effect. Front shows title, icon, and media; back reveals multiple descriptions.
details: Use for interactive feature showcases where users can explore details by clicking. Each card flips 180 degrees on Y-axis with 3D perspective. Front side displays title with Plus icon button and media content (image/video). Back side shows same title with X icon (rotated Plus) and multiple description texts. Uses CardStack for grid/carousel layout. Best for 3-6 items where engagement and exploration is desired.

structure.title: string - Card title on both sides (required)
structure.descriptions: string[] - Array of descriptions shown on back side (min: 1, recommended: 3, max: 5)
structure.imageSrc: string - Path to image (optional if videoSrc provided)
structure.videoSrc: string - Path to video (optional if imageSrc provided)

featureRules.note: Each feature requires id, title, descriptions array (1-5 items, recommended 3), and media (image or video). Cards flip to reveal descriptions on click.

propsSchema.features: Array<{ id: string, title: string, descriptions: string[], imageSrc?: string, videoSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string }>
propsSchema.title: string (required)
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>

usageExample: <FeatureCardTwentySeven features={[{ id: '1', title: 'Web Development', descriptions: ['Custom websites built with modern technologies', 'Best practices for optimal performance', 'Responsive design for all devices'], imageSrc: '/service1.jpg', imageAlt: 'Web Development' }]} gridVariant="uniform-all-items-equal" animationType="slide-up" title="Our Services" description="Discover what makes us different" textboxLayout="default" useInvertedBackground={false} />
do: Use for interactive feature showcases where exploration is desired
Use high-quality images or videos for the front side
Keep descriptions concise for back side readability
dont: Do not use without media for each feature
Do not use for text-heavy content on front side
Do not use for more than 8 items
